narrative:
Falls Township has 5,922 registered voters, with 50.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.3%, a pronounced Republican lean of 18.8 percentage points.
